sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh in itna tawh inn ah hong sam;
Tuni’n hong sam, tuni’n hong sam;
tang hong itna pan a pualam,
Bang ding kidai thah na hiam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh’n hong pia nuam a gimte tawldam;
Na van va puak inla, ngah in lungdam,
Nang a hong nial kei ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh’n hong ngak hi, pai in tu laitak;
Na mawhna mah tawh va kun in niamtak,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh in hong zol hi, A aw ngai in:
Nuamna ngah ding hi, Amah umte in,
